command:
uv run python -c 
import urllib.request, ssl, re, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

url = 'https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?db=pmc&id=3265025&rettype=full&retmode=xml'
headers = {'User-Agent': 'research-bot/1.0 (mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'}
ctx = ssl.create_default_context(); ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60, context=ctx) as resp:
    xml_data = resp.read()

print(f'Downloaded {len(xml_data)} bytes of XML')

# Parse and extract text
root = ET.fromstring(xml_data)

def get_text_recursive(elem, depth=0):
    parts = []
    if elem.text and elem.text.strip():
        parts.append(elem.text.strip())
    for child in elem:
        tag = child.tag.split('}')[-1] if '}' in child.tag else child.tag
        child_text = get_text_recursive(child, depth+1)
        if child_text.strip():
            parts.append(child_text)
        if child.tail and child.tail.strip():
            parts.append(child.tail.strip())
    return ' '.join(parts)

# Extract just the article body text
body_parts = []
for section in root.iter('sec'):
    title_elem = section.find('title')
    title = title_elem.text if title_elem is not None else 'Untitled'
    body_parts.append(f'### {title}')
    # Get paragraph text
    for p in section.findall('.//p'):
        p_text = get_text_recursive(p)
        if p_text.strip():
            body_parts.append(p_text[:2000])  # Cap per paragraph
    body_parts.append('')

full_text = '\n'.join(body_parts)
print(f'Extracted {len(full_text)} chars of body text')
print('--- FIRST 3000 chars ---')
print(full_text[:3000])
